name: historical purchase list
query: { purchases(block: { number: 10845898 }, first: 1, orderBy: block, orderDirection: asc) { id block transactionHash } }

name: campaign relation
query: { purchases(block: { number: 10845898 }, first: 1) { id campaign { id } } }

name: variables and where
query: query($ids: [Bytes!]) { campaigns(block: { number: 10846000 }, where: { id_in: $ids }, orderBy: id, orderDirection: asc) { id producer { id } } }
